query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `23_system_logs` (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `timestamp` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  nivel ENUM('info','warn','error','success') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info',
  fonte VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  mensagem TEXT NOT NULL,
  detalhes TEXT,
  userId INT,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL
);

  `timestamp` BIGINT NOT NULL,

  fonte VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  mensagem TEXT NOT NULL,
  detalhes TEXT,
  userId INT,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL
